did tpot 17 come out literally 4 hours ago? yes. but am I a dedicated woman? abso-fucking-lutely.

no cuz why did one crashing out at donut lowkey do something for me………….

guys im joking i swear (someone needs to tape my mouth shut before i start rambling about all the things I’d let her do to me omfg)

also I changed my design for her a little so her arms are just made of pure magic instead of robot arms bcuz it’s cool :D i’ll probably make a ref sheet soon
